description:
You are working as a web-developer who needs to quickly identify which client
addresses have been generating “404 Not Found” responses on the development
server.

1. A single Apache style log file already exists at
   /home/user/webapp/logs/access.log.

2. Using one (and only one) **awk or sed** command (you may combine pipes or
   use built-ins, but make sure everything is executed as a single composite
   shell line) extract the list of every **unique** IPv4 address that produced
   an HTTP status code of **404**, sort the addresses in ascending order, and
   save the final list to

   /home/user/webapp/reports/404_ips.txt

   • The /home/user/webapp/reports directory does not exist yet; create it
     before writing the file so the command executes without errors.  
   • The output file must contain nothing except the IPv4 addresses—one
     address per line, in ascending (lexicographic) order, with **no blank
     lines** before, after, or between entries, and it must end with a single
     trailing newline.

3. After running the command, verify that the file exactly matches the required
   format.  (The automated test will read /home/user/webapp/reports/404_ips.txt
   and compare it byte-for-byte with the expected contents.)

Example of the required output format (exactly two lines and a final newline):

192.168.0.42
203.0.113.77

No additional console output is necessary for grading, only the correctly
created file.
truth:
Initial state provided to the agent:

Directory tree:
  /home/user/webapp/
      logs/
          access.log        (permissions 0644, owned by user)
      (reports/ does not yet exist)

Exact contents of /home/user/webapp/logs/access.log:

127.0.0.1 - - [12/Jun/2023:10:55:32 +0000] "GET /index.html HTTP/1.1" 200 1024 "-" "Mozilla/5.0"
192.168.0.42 - - [12/Jun/2023:10:55:35 +0000] "GET /does-not-exist HTTP/1.1" 404 512 "-" "Mozilla/5.0"
10.10.10.10 - - [12/Jun/2023:10:55:37 +0000] "POST /login HTTP/1.1" 302 256 "-" "Mozilla/5.0"
172.16.0.5 - - [12/Jun/2023:10:55:40 +0000] "GET /admin HTTP/1.1" 403 2048 "-" "Mozilla/5.0"
192.168.0.42 - - [12/Jun/2023:10:55:45 +0000] "GET /another-missing HTTP/1.1" 404 512 "-" "Mozilla/5.0"
203.0.113.77 - - [12/Jun/2023:10:55:50 +0000] "GET /favicon.ico HTTP/1.1" 404 128 "-" "Mozilla/5.0"
127.0.0.1 - - [12/Jun/2023:10:56:01 +0000] "GET /assets/css/main.css HTTP/1.1" 200 4096 "-" "Mozilla/5.0"

Expected artefacts after successful completion:

1. The directory /home/user/webapp/reports must exist.

2. The file /home/user/webapp/reports/404_ips.txt must exist with permissions
   0644 and contain EXACTLY:

192.168.0.42
203.0.113.77

   (including a single trailing newline after 203.0.113.77).

Automated verification will check:
• Directory existence.  
• File existence and permissions.  
• File contents match the above string byte-for-byte.
